behavior_summary: STMITE::look handles the player (or other actor) examining a stalagmite item: it sets up item context bookkeeping, constructs the short description string "stalagmite ", invokes the item's bark/display routine to present that text to the viewer, and then yields/suspends.

A helper, U8P_STMITE::STMITE::00AE, implements a frame-driven animation/behavior loop for the stalagmite: it repeatedly sets frames, pushes the item for processing, reads the resulting frame, maps certain frames to short state codes, spawns debris/effect at the item's coordinates (Item::pop) and creates a FREE::1C19 spawn tied to the actor (pid).

When the helper reaches its terminating condition it changes the item type to 0x0305 and sets its frame to 0, which appears to convert the stalagmite into a broken/alternate state (inferred from the setType call).
notable_control_flow: U8P_STMITE::STMITE::look: set info/process-exclude bookkeeping -> build constant string "stalagmite " -> call Item::bark(pid, "stalagmite ") -> suspend/yield.

U8P_STMITE::STMITE::00AE: initialize loop counter ([BP-02h]=1) and state code ([BP-04h]=0) -> loop: Item::setFrame(counter), Item::push(), Item::getFrame() -> map frame to a small code -> compute spawn coordinates using Item::getX/Y/Z (Z adjusted) -> Item::pop(x,y,z,0x0A) -> spawn FREE::1C19(pid,0x0A,0) -> suspend -> increment counter and repeat until termination condition -> Item::setType(0x0305); Item::setFrame(0).
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of item type 0x0305 (inferred to be a broken stalagmite state but not confirmed).
Precise mapping of individual frame values to the code stored in [BP-04h] and what each code specifically represents beyond triggering debris/spawn behavior.
Where and when U8P_STMITE::STMITE::00AE is invoked in-game (what event triggers the helper: e.g., collision, damage, scripted timer?).
Detailed behavior and properties of the spawned FREE::1C19 effect (visual vs. gameplay effect, lifetime, interaction with pid).

main_function.name: U8P_STMITE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the examine/U8P_STMITE::look behavior for the stalagmite item by presenting a short description to the viewer and performing necessary item bookkeeping.
entry_conditions: Invoked when an actor examines/looks at the stalagmite item (event: U8P_STMITE::look/examine / area-enter semantics).

function_map.name: U8P_STMITE::look
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_STMITE::look' (examine) event for the stalagmite; prepare item context and call Item::bark to display 'stalagmite '.

function_map.name: U8P_STMITE::00AE
function_map.role: Frame-driven animation/behavior loop; spawns debris/effects and eventually converts the item type to 0x0305 (broken state).

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Display or emit a short text/message from an item to a target actor/process (used to show the 'stalagmite ' text).

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Set the item's animation/frame index used by the helper to drive state changes.

function_map.name: Item::push
function_map.role: Engine bookkeeping to apply frame changes or queue the item for processing so subsequent getFrame reflects the update.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Return current frame index for decision logic inside the helper.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Get item's X coordinate for spawning debris/effects.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Get item's Y coordinate for spawning debris/effects.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Get item's Z coordinate for spawning debris/effects (helper adjusts Z slightly).

function_map.name: Item::pop
function_map.role: Spawn/create an object/effect at given coordinates and byte parameter (used to place debris).

function_map.name: spawn FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawn a free-standing debris/effect actor tied to pid and a byte parameter (0x0A).

function_map.name: Item::setType
function_map.role: Change the item's type/identity (used to convert stalagmite to type 0x0305 at helper termination).

internal_calls.purpose: Present the short description string 'stalagmite ' to the viewing actor/process.
Set successive frames to drive the animation/behavior loop.
Ensure the item processes its new frame value before reading it back via getFrame.
Read the current frame to decide which debris/spawn behavior to execute.
Obtain X coordinate for placing spawned debris/effect.
Obtain Y coordinate for placing spawned debris/effect.
Obtain Z coordinate (adjusted) for placing spawned debris/effect.
Create debris/effect at the computed coordinates with parameter 0x0A.
Spawn an associated free actor/effect (debris/particle) tied to the actor pid and parameter 0x0A.
On termination, change the item type to 0x0305 (inferred to mark it broken/changed).

external_calls.purpose: Emit/display the string 'stalagmite ' to the viewer PID.
Drive and sample frame changes as the animation/behavior loop evolves.
Compute spawn location and create debris/effects in the world at the item's location.
Create a visible/audible free actor effect associated with pid (used when certain frames are reached).
Finalize the transformation of the item into type 0x0305 when the helper ends.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: STMITE::look handles the player (or other actor) examining a stalagmite item: it sets up item context bookkeeping, constructs the short description string "stalagmite ", invokes the item's bark/display routine to present that text to the viewer, and then yields/suspends.
